stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
You are about to depart for a commercial flight within the European region. As part of your pre-flight calculations and given the following information, you need to calculate the Traffic Load in accordance with the standard passenger and baggage masses, as defined in the annex.

Flight crew: 4 male & 3 female
Male passengers: 55
Female passengers: 44
Children: 4 sat on their own seat
Infants: 3 sat with their parents
Baggage: 52 items
Standard mass for a flight crew member: 85 kg
Non-revenue load: 550 kg
Cargo compartments: Forward hold 1800 kg, Aft hold 1200 kg, all loaded on pallets
Additional Bulk Cargo: 250 kg
